name: Joel Creasey
blurb: He emerged in the early 2010s on the festival circuit, earning a Best Newcomer nomination at the Melbourne International Comedy Festival, and built a reputation through sell-out national tours.
bio: Joel Creasey is an Australian stand-up comedian, actor and television and radio presenter known for his camp, acid-tongued and confessional style. He emerged in the early 2010s on the festival circuit, earning a Best Newcomer nomination at the Melbourne International Comedy Festival, and built a reputation through sell-out national tours. He has also worked extensively as a broadcaster and television host.

timeline.ev: Melbourne Comedy Festival debut with Slumber Party
The Drama Captain sells out a Melbourne run
Opens for Joan Rivers in New York
Releases Queen of the Outback on Prime Video

accolades: Best Newcomer nomination, Melbourne International Comedy Festival 2010
Best Show nominations at Sydney and Perth Comedy Festivals
Long-running Eurovision host for SBS Australia

bits.yt_title: Joel Creasey - 2015 Comedy Up Late on ABC (Ep7)
